summary: FR-SCENE-001 (3D Scene Rendering) implementation verified complete on main. Scene3D.tsx replaces stub with full R3F Canvas (lighting, Grid, OrbitControls with LEFT freed for brick placement). WebGL error handler registered in main.tsx. All 3 test IDs (T-FE-SCENE-001-01, T-FE-SCENE-001-02, T-FE-SCENE-001-03) implemented and merged via PR #45. New PR #54 opened on feature/8-scene-3d-rendering for review. Handoff artifacts at docs/handoffs/app-legobuilder-challenger-config1-20240615/030_frontend-coding-agent_complete.json.

artifacts.name: Scene3D-component
artifacts.description: R3F Canvas with lighting, Grid, OrbitControls (LEFT freed for brick placement)

artifacts.name: GridPlane-component
artifacts.description: Invisible clickable plane mesh for brick placement (ThreeEvent)

artifacts.name: InstancedBricks-component
artifacts.description: InstancedMesh renderer with geometry disposal on unmount

artifacts.name: main-webgl-error-handler
artifacts.description: Global window.__legoBuilderErrors WebGL error handler for KR-1.3

recommended_actions: Review PR #54 (feature/8-scene-3d-rendering) for Scene3D implementation quality
Verify OrbitControls mouseButtons={{ LEFT: undefined }} configuration
Verify main.tsx has window.__legoBuilderErrors global error handler
Confirm T-FE-SCENE-001-01, T-FE-SCENE-001-02, T-FE-SCENE-001-03 pass in CI
Check GridPlane uses ThreeEvent (not DOM PointerEvent) for brick placement
